changelog: UX (DEV ONLY): When a game is live but TheSportsDB hasn't pushed scores yet, the card now shows 'LIVE · 2H 14M' (elapsed time) and an em-dash separator — instead of just 'VS'. Backend live-refresh window widened from 4h to 6h to catch lingering MLB games. Some games (e.g. Brewers @ Cardinals you tested) genuinely don't have score data on TheSportsDB's free tier even when they're live in real life — the elapsed timer is the best signal we can give without a paid sports-data feed.
